title: Public Service Commission (Delegation and Deputation of President's Functions) Regulations, 2011
title_en: Public Service Commission (Delegation and Deputation of President's Functions) Regulations, 2011

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: These Regulations may be cited as the Public Service Commission (Delegation and Deputation of President’s Functions) Regulations, 2011.

provisions.title: Delegation of President’s functions
provisions.content: The President hereby delegates to the Public Service Commission the exercise of any of the functions conferred upon him under section 21 of the Public Service Act. [ Cap. 298 ]

provisions.title: Deputation of President’s functions
provisions.content: Subject to provisions of regulations 2 , the Public Service Commission is hereby authorized to depute to the Heads of Public Schools and Principals of the Public Teachers Colleges, the performance of functions and exercise of powers of the President on the matters relating to the administration of Teachers Service within their jurisdiction.
